categories.label: Architecture
categories.description: Design, restoration, visualization and competition projects.

subcategories.label: Projects
subcategories.description: Original design projects ranging from residential to public and cultural buildings.

subgroups.label: Design
subgroups.description: Original design projects ranging from residential to public and cultural buildings.

subgroups.label: Restoration & Renovation
subgroups.description: Conservation and adaptive reuse projects. Sensitive interventions within existing historic and contemporary structures.

subcategories.label: Visualization & Drawing
subcategories.description: Architectural representation through rendering, diagram and hand drawing.

subcategories.label: Competition Management
subcategories.description: Coordination and submission management for national and international competitions.

categories.label: Interior
categories.description: Interior design projects ranging from residential to commercial.

subcategories.label: Residential
subcategories.description: Private living spaces designed around daily life and personal narrative.

subcategories.label: Retail
subcategories.description: Spatial identities for retail environments including cafes, bookstores and shops.

subcategories.label: Hospitality
subcategories.description: Hotel, restaurant and hospitality interiors focused on atmosphere and experience.

subcategories.label: Workspace
subcategories.description: Office and studio environments designed for focus, collaboration and culture.

categories.label: Product
categories.description: Furniture, retail fixtures and product concepts.

subcategories.label: Furniture
subcategories.description: Custom furniture and built-in joinery designed for residential and commercial contexts.

subcategories.label: Kiosk & Display
subcategories.description: Kiosk and display system designs for retail environments and public spaces. Also referenced under Interior / Retail.

subcategories.label: Branding & Spatial Identity
subcategories.description: Branded spatial environments where architecture, material and identity converge into a coherent whole.

subcategories.label: Objects & Artifacts
subcategories.description: Small-scale objects, brewing apparatus, handcrafted items and experimental product concepts.

subcategories.label: Game Design
subcategories.description: Interactive experiences and game environments developed in Unreal Engine. Narrative-driven spatial explorations.

subcategories.label: Spatial Design
subcategories.description: Interactive spatial systems and environments developed in Unity 3D. Bridging physical space and digital interaction.

subcategories.label: Installations
subcategories.description: Site-specific interactive installations combining sensor systems, projection and audience participation.

categories.label: Immersive
categories.description: Immersive audio-visual environments and spatial experiences.

subcategories.label: Audio-Visual Environments
subcategories.description: Synchronized sound and image environments for live performance and installation.

subcategories.label: Fulldome
subcategories.description: 360-degree dome projections and immersive spatial narratives.

subcategories.label: Projection Mapping
subcategories.description: Site-specific projection works that transform architectural surfaces.

categories.label: VR / AR / XR
categories.description: 360 degree, fulldome, animations and virtual, augmented experiences.

subcategories.label: 360 & Fulldome
subcategories.description: 360 degree animations and fulldome productions. Screened at Ars Electronica, MediaArchitecture Biennale Vienna and international fulldome festivals.

subcategories.label: Virtual Reality
subcategories.description: Immersive VR environments and experiences. Spatial narratives designed for head-mounted display.

subcategories.label: Augmented Reality
subcategories.description: AR interventions layering digital content onto physical space. Site-specific and mobile-based experiences.

subcategories.label: Extended Reality
subcategories.description: Hybrid experiences operating across the spectrum of physical and digital presence.

subcategories.label: 3D Animation
subcategories.description: Three-dimensional animations produced for architectural visualization, art projects and festival screenings.

subcategories.label: Essay Film & Documentary
subcategories.description: Essayistic documentary films exploring migration, memory and cultural history. Also referenced under Academic / Archive.

subcategories.label: Experimental Video
subcategories.description: Experimental moving image works exhibited at B3 Biennial Frankfurt, Bauhaus Summaery and international film festivals.

subcategories.label: Stop Motion
subcategories.description: Frame-by-frame animation works combining handcrafted objects, material textures and spatial environments.

subcategories.label: Motion Graphics
subcategories.description: Motion design and title sequences produced for film, installation and broadcast contexts.

subcategories.label: Architecture
subcategories.description: Photographs of built environments, interiors and urban space.

subcategories.label: Documentary
subcategories.description: Long-form documentary projects engaging with place, memory and community.

subcategories.label: Street
subcategories.description: Candid photography from cities across Europe, Asia and the Middle East.

subcategories.label: Portrait
subcategories.description: Portraits made across documentary, editorial and personal contexts.

categories.label: Sound
categories.description: Sound collages, podcasts and radio broadcasts.

subcategories.label: Collages
subcategories.description: Assembled sound works drawing from field recordings, found audio and archival material.

subcategories.label: Soundscape
subcategories.description: Environmental and spatial sound compositions designed for installation and place-based listening.

subcategories.label: Podcasts
subcategories.description: Conversations on architecture, media art and spatial culture.

subcategories.label: Radio
subcategories.description: Broadcasts and archival recordings from independent radio platforms.
